pytorch_task_v1.prompt_instructions: Implement this ML task as a SINGLE self-contained Python file (task.py). Include all required functions AND a complete `if __name__ == '__main__':` block that trains the model, evaluates on a validation split, prints standard metrics (MSE, R2, parameter accuracy where applicable), and asserts quality thresholds so the script exits non-zero on failure. Do NOT create separate test files or README. The script itself is the test.
evaluation_rules: The `evaluate()` function MUST compute and return standard metrics: MSE, R2 score, and any task-specific metrics on the VALIDATION data split.

The `if __name__ == '__main__':` block MUST: (1) train the model, (2) evaluate on BOTH train and validation splits, (3) print all metrics clearly, (4) assert quality thresholds (e.g., R2 > 0.9, MSE < threshold), (5) exit 0 on success or non-zero on failure.
Do NOT use a separate test file. All evaluation logic goes in main().

tasks.description: Train a small ResNet-style CNN on CIFAR-100 (100 classes) with Mixup data augmentation and cosine annealing LR schedule. Demonstrates improved generalization through input interpolation.

requirements.math: Define Mixup: x_mix = lam*x_i + (1-lam)*x_j, y_mix = lam*y_i + (1-lam)*y_j where lam ~ Beta(alpha, alpha). Cosine annealing: lr_t = lr_min + 0.5*(lr_max - lr_min)*(1 + cos(pi*t/T)).
requirements.data: CIFAR-100 via torchvision (falls back to structured synthetic data). 100 classes, 32x32 RGB images.
requirements.implementation: SmallResNet with BasicBlock residual connections; Mixup applied during training; Adam optimizer with CosineAnnealingLR scheduler.
requirements.evaluation: Top-1 and Top-5 accuracy on validation split.
requirements.main_block: Train for 15 epochs, print train/val loss, top-1 and top-5 accuracy. Assert top-1 > 5% and top-5 > 15%.
requirements.output: Save model weights and metrics JSON.

tasks.description: Binary sentiment classification using an LSTM recurrent neural network. Embedding layer maps token IDs to dense vectors, bidirectional LSTM processes sequences, and FC layer classifies sentiment.

requirements.math: LSTM gates: f_t = sigma(W_f[h_{t-1}, x_t] + b_f), i_t = sigma(W_i[h_{t-1}, x_t] + b_i), o_t = sigma(W_o[h_{t-1}, x_t] + b_o). Binary cross-entropy loss.
requirements.data: Synthetic sentiment sequences with positive/negative token distributions. 4000 samples, 50 token sequences.
requirements.implementation: Embedding -> 2-layer LSTM -> Dropout -> FC(1). BCEWithLogitsLoss, Adam optimizer. Gradient clipping at norm 5.0.
requirements.evaluation: Accuracy, Precision, Recall, F1 on validation split.
requirements.main_block: Train for 15 epochs, print all metrics. Assert accuracy > 65% and F1 > 0.55.
requirements.output: Save model weights and metrics JSON.

tasks.description: L1-regularized linear regression using coordinate descent optimization with manual soft-thresholding. No autograd, no torch.optim — demonstrates sparsity recovery on synthetic data where only 3 of 20 features are relevant.

requirements.math: Lasso objective: J(w) = (1/2n)||Xw-y||^2 + lambda||w||_1. Soft-threshold: S(z,g) = sign(z)*max(|z|-g, 0). Coordinate descent update for each feature.
requirements.data: Synthetic sparse regression: 500 samples, 20 features, only 3 have non-zero true coefficients (3.0, -2.0, 1.5) + bias 1.0.
requirements.implementation: Manual coordinate descent cycling through features. Soft-thresholding operator. No autograd, no nn.Module, no optimizer.
requirements.evaluation: MSE, R2, number of non-zero learned weights, support recovery (checking if true features are identified).
requirements.main_block: Train for 300 epochs, print MSE, R2, sparsity. Assert R2 > 0.80, non-zero features <= 8, and at least 2/3 true features recovered.
requirements.output: Save model weights and metrics JSON.

tasks.description: Simulate Federated Averaging (FedAvg) across 5 clients with non-IID data splits using logistic regression. Compare federated model against a centralized training baseline.

requirements.math: FedAvg: w_{t+1} = sum(n_k/n)*w_k. Each client trains locally with SGD for E local epochs. Server aggregates weighted by client dataset size.
requirements.data: Synthetic 2-class classification, 2000 samples, 10 features. Data split non-IID across 5 clients (sorted by label with overlap).
requirements.implementation: LogisticRegression via nn.Linear. FedAvg aggregation with deep copy per round. Centralized baseline for comparison. SGD optimizer per client.
requirements.evaluation: Accuracy, Precision, Recall, F1 for both federated and centralized models.
requirements.main_block: Federated: 25 rounds, 5 local epochs. Centralized: 50 epochs. Assert federated accuracy > 70% and gap vs centralized < 15%.
requirements.output: Save federated model weights and comparative metrics JSON.
